headline: ROAD CLOSED (24/7)
description: Cedar Drive Upgrade (Phase 2): Full road closure between 4150 Cedar Drive and Gilleys Trail (north of Victoria Drive). Closed 24/7. Use alternative routes.

headline: ROAD OBSTRUCTION / UTILITY WORK
description: Metro Vancouver Water Main Work: Ongoing lane closures and traffic restrictions on Ranch Park Way at Dewdney Trunk Road. Expect delays.

headline: LANE REDUCTIONS / UTILITY WORK
description: Intermittent utility work and lane reductions occurring around the intersection of Clarke Road and Como Lake Avenue.

headline: WATERMAIN REPLACEMENT
description: Full road closure on Pipeline Road between David Ave and Guildford Way for critical watermain upgrades. Local traffic only, emergency vehicles detour via Johnson St.

headline: PAVEMENT REHABILITATION
description: Single lane alternating traffic on Westwood Street between Lougheed Highway and Dewdney Trunk Road. Speed limit reduced to 30km/h. Expect minor delays.
